title: El enmascarado de plata
writer: René Cardona, José G. Cruz, Ramón Obón
actors: Víctor Junco, Crox Alvarado, Luis Aldás
plot: This cult-classic was Director Rene Cardona's attempt to capitalize on the popularity of professional wrestling and on of its biggest stars of the 1950's, known as "El Santo". However it is not about wrestling. It chronicles the a...
